description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a central skylight. The front facade features a small porch area, a tree, and a seating arrangement, while the rear includes a private garden with a pool and a row of tall shrubs for privacy. Large, rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically along the sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in a light gray color, complemented by darker window frames and minimalistic landscaping. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall, with additional greenery and a small outdoor seating area visible on one side. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a front porch and a private backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, a tree, seating area, and the main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting large windows, a small garden, and a row of tall shrubs at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, tall shrubs, and rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows, a small outdoor seating area, and a tree.
